# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_omevv_firmware_compliance_info (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `clusters` (String) Cluster details to retrieve the firmware compliance report.

### Read-Only

- `firmware_compliance_info` (String) Details of the compliance report.
- `msg` (String) Retrive the firmware compliance report.
